home.hero_subtitle: Discover premium blends from around the world
home.feat_direct_desc: From the best plantations in China, Japan, and India without intermediaries.
home.feat_eco_desc: Natural tea leaves without added chemicals and flavorings.
home.feat_fast_desc: We deliver fresh tea all over Uzbekistan in the shortest time.
home.hits_desc: What our customers choose most often
home.blog_title: How to brew green tea properly so it doesn't get bitter?
home.blog_desc: Many people refuse green tea because of its "bitterness". In fact, the secret lies in the correct water temperature and steeping time. Discover the 3 main rules for ideal brewing.
home.news_desc: Get secret discounts and be the first to know about new blends

contacts_page.title: FateLeaf Contacts
contacts_page.subtitle: Contact us and we will help you choose the perfect blend for your mood
contacts_page.form_success: Your message has been successfully sent!
contacts_page.address_text: Tashkent, Amir Temur Avenue, 107 (Entrance from the courtyard, landmark — FateLeaf sign)
contacts_page.wholesale_desc: Want to see FateLeaf in your restaurant or store?
contacts_page.faq_q1: How to check the order status?
contacts_page.faq_a1: You can track your order status in your Personal Account after logging in.
contacts_page.faq_q2: Can I pick up my order from the showroom?
contacts_page.faq_a2: Yes, of course! Our showroom is open Monday to Saturday from 10:00 to 20:00. Please let us know in advance so we can prepare your order.
contacts_page.faq_q3: How to return or exchange an item?
contacts_page.faq_a3: You can return or exchange goods within 14 days of purchase, provided the original packaging and receipt are preserved. Please contact us via the feedback form or Telegram.

contacts_page.form_badge_gift: I want to choose tea as a gift
contacts_page.showroom_subtitle: Take a peek behind the scenes of FateLeaf tea culture
contacts_page.slide_desc_1: Unique Yixing clay teapots and handpicked tea varieties on our wooden shelves.
contacts_page.slide_desc_2: Discover new tasting dimensions during individual tea degustations.
contacts_page.slide_desc_3: A professional guide will welcome you and help you choose the ideal tea blend.
contacts_page.slide_desc_4: A premium sanctuary for quiet conversations and relaxing tea breaks.

quiz.title: Tea Navigator
quiz.subtitle: Find your perfect tea blend with 3 simple questions
quiz.step1_q: What do you want right now?
quiz.step1_opt1_d: For productive work and clarity of mind in the morning or afternoon
quiz.step1_opt2_d: Slow down and relieve stress after a long day
quiz.step1_opt3_d: Exotic taste, rare varieties, and a premium look
quiz.step2_q: Which taste profile do you prefer?
quiz.step2_opt1_d: Floral, herbal, and refreshing meadow notes
quiz.step2_opt2_d: Notes of caramel, honey, and juicy dried fruits
quiz.step2_opt3_d: Deep earthy, smoky, or rich astringent profile
quiz.step2_opt4_d: Tartness of ripe berries and freshness of Sicilian citrus fruits
quiz.step3_q: How do you usually brew tea?
quiz.step3_opt1_d: In a gaiwan, Yixing clay pot, or using the gongfu method
quiz.step3_opt2_d: In a standard teapot, easy-pot (tipod), or favorite mug at work
quiz.step3_opt3_d: Specific tools (e.g. a bamboo whisk for whipping matcha)
quiz.result_title: Your perfect tea ritual for today:
quiz.btn_cart: Add Set to Cart with 10% Discount
quiz.set_focus_desc: You specified that you want to energize and prefer a rich earthy taste. A set of Dark Phoenix Da Hong Pao and aged Comet Comfort Shu Pu-erh will deliver deep focus and a boost of strength.
quiz.set_matcha_desc: You chose energy and powder format. Authentic Japanese Mystic Matcha paired with the century-old traditions of the Chasen bamboo whisk will bring soft focus and morning Zen.
quiz.set_fresh_desc: You want to relax and appreciate a light floral profile. The freshness of elite Longjing Zenith Zen paired with delicate Silver Needles white tea will dissolve daily stress.
quiz.set_sweet_desc: You are looking for balance and prefer honey-creamy undertones. Nebula Nectar Milk Oolong combined with exquisite Tie Guanyin Astral Amulet will create an incredibly cozy tea session.
quiz.set_warm_desc: You selected relaxation and quick brewing. Warm red Dian Hong Golden Monkey and spicy Solstice Sun Assam will bring a sense of warmth and home comfort.
quiz.set_berry_desc: For ultimate caffeine-free relaxation. The soothing lavender-chamomile Rune Repose blend and rich fruit-berry Berry Vortex karkade will restore balance and set you up for a sound sleep.
quiz.set_gift_desc: You are looking for premium tea as a gift. Our signature set in a gold-embossed box combines 4 of the best varieties and is perfect for connoisseurs.

logisticsSec.noCurrencies: Additional currencies not added. Only the base currency will be displayed on the site.
